description: Remove SMALL_TALK from early intercept guards in mk_entry.cpp to avoid swallowing short imperative commands and bare math via Telegram
steps: Step 1 - Remove '|| inputType == MKInputType::SMALL_TALK' from the early intercept condition in handle_natural_query (around line 1234) in mk_entry.cpp
Step 2 - Remove '|| inputType == MKInputType::SMALL_TALK' from the early intercept condition in generate_ai_response (around line 1774) in mk_entry.cpp
acceptance_criteria: Both early intercept blocks only check GREETING, GOODBYE, and VAGUE_RESPONSE
Short imperative commands like 'tell me about docker' are no longer swallowed by casual response
Bare math like '5 times 3' via Telegram path is no longer intercepted
findings: SMALL_TALK removed from both intercept guards. Build: 0 errors (15 pre-existing warnings). Tests: 67 passed, 0 failed, 484 assertions. Short imperative commands and bare math via Telegram are no longer swallowed.
